toolDescriptions.tool: Advanced Tavily web search for second-opinion search, deeper source discovery, and Tavily-specific search controls. Use when Serper results are thin or ambiguous, when another search source would improve confidence, or when the user asks for Tavily.

Preferred deeper known-webpage extraction for source-packet workflows. Use when the model needs query-aware extraction, reduced boilerplate, relevant chunks, or cleaner evidence from a known URL. Do not use for file-like URLs that the local workstation can inspect.
